reviews.review_description: There's a button to "change room" on a podium, but it doesn't change anything. Also need an alternate account to upload your own avatar.
How do you move the avatar or make it walk? Whats the difference between tracking options?

I find it all Bit silly because you can touch yourself  in that game and I didn't really touched someone in vr like that and the physics I tried to kiss myself and it worked then I was happy and the fun part is you can touche youreself it's like a felling you never had (I never had a girlfriend no one likes me I'm always lonely I have no friends I'm fat and ugly people think I'm weird because of my look and my acting does anybody whant to be my friend?)  If no that's ok I understand 😞
an avatar behind a button, what the hell is this useless stuff for? the framerate is also low! download uni live viewer which is beautiful, this is garbage
